channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: Major ChatGPT upgrade rolling out now, in the form of GPT-5.5 Instant:
item.author: @gdb

item.title: In vividly explaining how he deceived Musk about his commitment to the nonprofit, without a trace of...
item.description:
In vividly explaining how he deceived Musk about his commitment to the nonprofit, without a trace of remorse, OpenAI’s Brockman has done Musk’s counsel quite a service.
Brockman’s also been pretty great about illustrating Musk’s contributions to the early years of the company.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 12 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 1016
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title: Using MSM, we can also empirically study which model specs or constitutions yield the best generaliz...
item.description:
Using MSM, we can also empirically study which model specs or constitutions yield the best generalization from alignment training.
Specifying rules works to some extent, but explaining the values underlying those rules (or adding more detailed subrules) is even better. https://t.co/b2XKbyBGeI
--- @AnthropicAI | ❤️ 8 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 4658
item.author: @AnthropicAI

item.title:
New Anthropic Fellows research: Model Spec Midtraining (MSM).
Standard alignment methods train AIs ...
item.description:
New Anthropic Fellows research: Model Spec Midtraining (MSM).
Standard alignment methods train AIs on examples of desired behavior. But this can fail to generalize to new situations.
MSM addresses this by first teaching AIs how we would like them to generalize and why.
--- @AnthropicAI | ❤️ 170 | 🔁 16 | 💬 25 | 👁 10459
item.author: @AnthropicAI

item.title: in particular, the combination of improvements to speed, intelligence, personality, and great memory...

@levelsio

item.title: RT @scottfalconer: @sama Each year I try to use a model to help me plan out my most efficient route ...
item.author: @nickbaumann_

item.title: Extreme levels of cope in the reply section here from employees at SaaS companies that don't want to...
item.description:
Extreme levels of cope in the reply section here from employees at SaaS companies that don't want to lose their job
SaaS stocks went down 80% for a reason
Obviously there will be SaaS that remain and new SaaS but many are just an hour or a day of work to replace with AI
I already built my own screenshot service (for social media images), image resizing for all my sites, NSFW content moderation, community content moderation, uptime monitor with status pages, automated backup service etc
Before I paid for all those SaaS!
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 109 | 🔁 4 | 💬 12 | 👁 16750
item.author: @levelsio
